title: RotateSk
description: Skript addon for packet-based rotation of player pitch/yaw.
body:
# RotateSk

A Skript addon that rotates a player's pitch/yaw based on packets.

## Supported Versions

* Minecraft: 1.9 – 1.21.10
* Skript: 2.3.6 – 2.12.2

## Requirements

* ProtocolLib (tested minimum version: 4.8.0)
* Skript (within supported versions)
* Server implementation: Bukkit/Spigot/Paper family

## Usage

### Added Expressions

* `[the] packet [based] pitch of %players%`
* `[the] packet [based] yaw of %players%`
* `%players%'[s] packet [based] pitch`
* `%players%'[s] packet [based] yaw`

### Examples

* `set player's packet based pitch to 45`
* `add 5 to player's packet based yaw`
* `subtract 3 from player's packet based pitch`

## Notes

* Since it uses reflection, it may not work on Minecraft versions newer than the supported ones.

[![SkriptHubViewTheDocs](http://skripthub.net/static/addon/ViewTheDocsButton.png)](http://skripthub.net/docs/?addon=RotateSk)
